idea-plugin.name: One Dark Modern Theme
idea-plugin.description:
A dark UI and editor color scheme for JetBrains IDEs, inspired by the One Dark Modern palette.

Includes tuned UI colors, solid secondary buttons, blue primary actions, and a curated syntax highlighting scheme for Java, Kotlin, JavaScript, TypeScript, XML, and more.

Also bundles Material Icon Theme file and folder icons, plus colorful tool window icons in the IDE sidebar.

Requires IntelliJ Platform 2025.1+ (New UI).
